title: The Citizens Push Back
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the citizens push back, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo Family, Luffy, Trebol, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as even as executives fall, the Birdcage keeps shrinking and turns the whole country into a race against time.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Begin- Ning with senior pink, the other executives have also...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: been defeated by the Warriors supporting straw hat luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The remaining upper tier members of the Donquiljote family are but four!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bellamy the hyena,

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Two Top Executives, Pica and TreBol,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And the current King of Dressrosa, the Shichibuki Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just four remain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't believe they've done this much for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And to think, we were actually going to take these people's heads...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: in an effort to save our- selves. How foolish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: King Riku! Old Man, Where're You Going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't believe my life is in danger anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm going down to the city.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's probably something I can do there to make myself useful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Allow me to accompany you!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I cannot allow us to rely on the world government or the Marines forever!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll go too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've gotta tell every- one still in the town that there's hope after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're probably dis- trauma... I doubt a single one of them ever expected to actually make it out of this game!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Hm? Where'd that marine Admiral run off to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He went down to the city some time ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gather the townspeople together in one place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Some- where we can protect them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: The plateau on which the Royal Palace is located

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Father...what's this earth- quake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Kyaaah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: AAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Re- Becca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: That is... the guy zero should've already taken care of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Pica!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Diamante...How pathetic of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: That's right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: It's not like I came here just for a one- on-one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: As long as enemies remain, the battle's not over! Gehughh...

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Stop, Father! You can barely move!

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: Allow me to ask you something. Just what exactly is King Riku to all of you?

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: rebecca. You endured years of boos and insults thanks to that man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Don't give me that nonsense! You lot were the ones that destroyed his reputation in the first place!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: To me, he is my stepfather! A man that has stood by me since my days as a good-for- nothing villain! My Savior!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The Riku Royal Family is one of the precious few in this world that understand the true meaning of peace!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This entire country is fervently praying for the arrival of the day when he kicks you bastards out of this country and takes his rightful place on its throne once again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: That was quite the earful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Eh!? He disap- peared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What the hell, man!? scared the crap out of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Now he's headed to level 3!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I'm that bastard's opponent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Do you even wanna fight!?

dialogue.speaker: Pica
dialogue.text: I can't end this if all you're gonna do is hide inside the plateau!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: The next time you get in my range, so help me im gonna smack you so hard upside your-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Gyaah!

summary: The Citizens Push Back advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo Family, Luffy, Trebol, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
